uploadDescription: Choose one or more local animated GIF files to convert.
chooseGifsLabel: Drag and drop GIFs here, or click to upload
uploadHint: Files stay private and are decoded in this browser.
optionsDescription: Control output size, playback timing, and loop behavior before export.
scaleDescription: Resize every frame from 10% to 400% of the original dimensions.
speedDescription: 1x keeps the original timing; 2x plays twice as fast and 0.5x plays half speed.
loopDescription: Preserve the GIF loop metadata, force infinite playback, or set a custom play count.
loopCountDescription: Use a whole number of plays for the exported WebP.
resultDescription: Preview converted animations and download individual WebP files or a batch ZIP.
emptyResultDescription: Upload GIFs and run conversion to preview animated WebP files here.
invalidFileTypeError: Select a valid GIF file to continue.
noFilesError: Upload at least one GIF before converting.
invalidGifError: The file is not a readable GIF.
invalidFrameError: GIF frames could not be decoded.
canvasUnavailableError: Canvas rendering is unavailable in this browser.
conversionFailedError: Failed to convert GIFs. Please try again.
partialConversionError: Some GIFs could not be converted.
zipFailedError: The GIFs converted, but creating the ZIP failed. Download files individually.
